name: HumanitZ
author: engels74@marx.ps
description: HumanitZ is a co-op, isometric, open world survival game in a world ended by the zombie outbreak. As one of the few human survivors, try to last as long as “humanly” possible. The past can’t be changed, but you can make a difference today for the future of humanity.

installation.script:
#!/bin/bash
# steamcmd Base Installation Script
#
# Server Files: /mnt/server
# Image to install with is 'ghcr.io/ptero-eggs/installers:debian'

##
#
# Variables
# STEAM_USER, STEAM_PASS, STEAM_AUTH - Steam user setup. If a user has 2fa enabled it will most likely fail due to timeout. Leave blank for anon install.
# WINDOWS_INSTALL - if it's a windows server you want to install set to 1
# SRCDS_APPID - steam app id found here - https://developer.valvesoftware.com/wiki/Dedicated_Servers_List
# SRCDS_BETAID - beta branch of a steam app. Leave blank to install normal branch
# SRCDS_BETAPASS - password for a beta branch should one be required during private or closed testing phases.. Leave blank for no password.
# INSTALL_FLAGS - Any additional SteamCMD  flags to pass during install.. Keep in mind that steamcmd auto update process in the docker image might overwrite or ignore these when it performs update on server boot.
# AUTO_UPDATE - Adding this variable to the egg allows disabling or enabling automated updates on boot. Boolean value. 0 to disable and 1 to enable.
#
 ##

# Install packages. Default packages below are not required if using our existing install image thus speeding up the install process.
#apt -y update
#apt -y --no-install-recommends install curl lib32gcc-s1 ca-certificates

## just in case someone removed the defaults.
if [[ "${STEAM_USER}" == "" ]] || [[ "${STEAM_PASS}" == "" ]]; then
    echo -e "steam user is not set.\n"
    echo -e "Using anonymous user.\n"
    STEAM_USER=anonymous
    STEAM_PASS=""
    STEAM_AUTH=""
else
    echo -e "user set to ${STEAM_USER}"
fi

## download and install steamcmd
cd /tmp
mkdir -p /mnt/server/steamcmd
curl -sSL -o steamcmd.tar.gz https://steamcdn-a.akamaihd.net/client/installer/steamcmd_linux.tar.gz
tar -xzvf steamcmd.tar.gz -C /mnt/server/steamcmd
mkdir -p /mnt/server/steamapps # Fix steamcmd disk write error when this folder is missing
cd /mnt/server/steamcmd

# SteamCMD fails otherwise for some reason, even running as root.
# This is changed at the end of the install process anyways.
chown -R root:root /mnt
export HOME=/mnt/server

## install game using steamcmd
./steamcmd.sh +force_install_dir /mnt/server +login ${STEAM_USER} ${STEAM_PASS} ${STEAM_AUTH} $( [[ "${WINDOWS_INSTALL}" == "1" ]] && printf %s '+@sSteamCmdForcePlatformType windows' ) +app_update ${SRCDS_APPID} $( [[ -z ${SRCDS_BETAID} ]] || printf %s "-beta ${SRCDS_BETAID}" ) $( [[ -z ${SRCDS_BETAPASS} ]] || printf %s "-betapassword ${SRCDS_BETAPASS}" ) ${INSTALL_FLAGS} validate +quit 

## set up 32 bit libraries
mkdir -p /mnt/server/.steam/sdk32
cp -v linux32/steamclient.so ../.steam/sdk32/steamclient.so

## set up 64 bit libraries
mkdir -p /mnt/server/.steam/sdk64
cp -v linux64/steamclient.so ../.steam/sdk64/steamclient.so

## making server files executable
chmod +x /mnt/server/HumanitZServer/Binaries/Linux/HumanitZServer-Linux-Shipping

## install end
echo "-----------------------------------------"
echo "Installation completed..."
echo "-----------------------------------------"

variables.name: [REQUIRED] Steam App ID
variables.description: Steam App ID of HumanitZ Server

variables.name: Auto Update
variables.description: Enable automatic updates on boot

variables.name: [REQUIRED] Steam Beta Branch
variables.description: This ensures the script will grab the Linux version of the server

variables.name: [REQUIRED] Steam Query Port
variables.description: Steam Query Port

variables.name: Server Name
variables.description: Name of the server

variables.name: Server Password
variables.description: Server password

variables.name: Welcome Message
variables.description: Create a WelcomeMessage.txt file in the same directory. Feel free to use the special colors like <SP>, <PN>, <PR>, <FO>, <CL>.
variables.default_value:
Create a WelcomeMessage.txt file in the same directory. Feel free to use the special colors.
When players join your server they will see this welcome message, feel free to add your server rules or whatever you need.
Welcome message is optional.

Example:

Welcome to <SP>Server name</>, enjoy your time.
<PN>Dar red color</>
<PR>Green color</>
<SP>Ember color</>
<FO>Gray color</>
<CL>Blue color</>

variables.name: Save Name
variables.description: Save file name

variables.name: Search ID
variables.description: Use this to place your server in a specific bucket and use it when searching. Changing this will make your server not show up in the default server list.

variables.name: Admin Password
variables.description: Used for admin access, you can use /adminaccess <password> in game to access admin commands.

variables.name: Max Players
variables.description: Maximum number of players allowed

variables.name: RCON Enabled
variables.description: Use it to execute remote command, use any rcon compatible program. Enabling this will allow server ping being displayed in server browser

variables.name: RCON Port
variables.description: TCP port for rcon

variables.name: RCON Password
variables.description: RCON password

variables.name: No Death Feedback
variables.description: If set to true notification about dead players will be disabled. Admins will still be able to see them.

variables.name: No Join Feedback
variables.description: If set to true notification about players joining and leaving the server will be disabled. Admins will still be able to see them.

variables.name: Limited Spawns
variables.description: When set to true players will only have access to random coast spawns and spawn point if available

variables.name: Save Interval Seconds
variables.description: The interval in seconds at which the server saves the world. Set to 0 to disable auto-saving.

variables.name: Perma Death
variables.description: When set to true the player that died will lose their character and have to create a a new one

variables.name: On Death Mode
variables.description: 0=Lose nothing, 1=Lose backpack and weapon in hand, 2=Previous + pockets and backpack, 3=All previous + Equipment

variables.name: Respawn Timer
variables.description: Time in second to be able to spawn again after death

variables.name: PVP
variables.description: false/true=Off/On. This will also affect the ability to interact with player items such as cars and containers

variables.name: Air Drop
variables.description: Set whether air drops are enabled or not

variables.name: Air Drop Interval
variables.description: How many game days between each AirDrop

variables.name: Weapon Break
variables.description: If true when weapon durability reaches 0%, the weapon will break and be removed from the player's inventory. Set to false to disable weapon breaking.

variables.name: Max Owned Cars
variables.description: How many cars you are allowed to own. Non owned cars can't be driven but can be looted.

variables.name: Multiplayer Sleep
variables.description: When true time passes if eveyone performs the sleep emote at the same time, false=Passing time is disabled

variables.name: Loot Respawn
variables.description: Loot does respawn, false=Never respawn

variables.name: Loot Respawn Timer
variables.description: If loot respawn is enabled, this is the time in minutes it takes for loot containers to respawn.

variables.name: Pickup Respawn Timer
variables.description: If loot respawn is enabled, this is the time in minutes it takes for pickup items to respawn.

variables.name: Rarity Food
variables.description: From 0 to 4 (Scarce, low, default, Plentiful, abundant)

variables.name: Rarity Drink
variables.description: From 0 to 4 (Scarce, low, default, Plentiful, abundant)

variables.name: Rarity Melee
variables.description: From 0 to 4 (Scarce, low, default, Plentiful, abundant)

variables.name: Rarity Ranged
variables.description: From 0 to 4 (Scarce, low, default, Plentiful, abundant)

variables.name: Rarity Ammo
variables.description: From 0 to 4 (Scarce, low, default, Plentiful, abundant)

variables.name: Rarity Armor
variables.description: From 0 to 4 (Scarce, low, default, Plentiful, abundant)

variables.name: Rarity Resources
variables.description: From 0 to 4 (Scarce, low, default, Plentiful, abundant)

variables.name: Rarity Other
variables.description: From 0 to 4 (Scarce, low, default, Plentiful, abundant)

variables.name: ZombieDiffHealth
variables.description: Health difficulty where 0=Very Easy, 1=Easy, 2=Default, 3=Hard, 4=Very Hard, 5=Nightmare

variables.name: ZombieDiffSpeed
variables.description: Speed difficulty where 0=Very Easy, 1=Easy, 2=Default, 3=Hard, 4=Very Hard, 5=Nightmare

variables.name: ZombieDiffDamage
variables.description: Damage difficulty where 0=Very Easy, 1=Easy, 2=Default, 3=Hard, 4=Very Hard, 5=Nightmare

variables.name: ZombieAmountMulti
variables.description: Zombie amount multiplier 2 for example would mean twice as many zombies. 0.5 would mean half as many zombies.

variables.name: HumanAmountMulti
variables.description: Human bandit amount multiplier 2 for example would mean twice as many human bandits. 0.5 would mean half as many human bandits.

variables.name: ZombieDogMulti
variables.description: Zombie dog mainly appear at night. 2 for example would mean twice as many zombie dogs. 0.5 would mean half as many zombie dogs.

variables.name: ZombieRespawnTimer
variables.description: The time in minutes it takes for zombies to respawn, set to 0 to disable zombie respawning.

variables.name: HumanRespawnTimer
variables.description: The time in minutes it takes for human bandits to respawn, set to 0 to disable human bandit respawning.

variables.name: HumanHealth
variables.description: Human bandit difficulty where 0=Very Easy, 1=Easy, 2=Default, 3=Hard, 4=Very Hard, 5=Nightmare

variables.name: HumanSpeed
variables.description: Human bandit speed difficulty where 0=Very Easy, 1=Easy, 2=Default, 3=Hard, 4=Very Hard, 5=Nightmare

variables.name: HumanDamage
variables.description: Human bandit damage difficulty where 0=Very Easy, 1=Easy, 2=Default, 3=Hard, 4=Very Hard, 5=Nightmare

variables.name: AnimalMulti
variables.description: Animal spawn multiplier, default 1

variables.name: AnimalRespawnTimer
variables.description: The time in minutes it takes for animals to respawn, set to 0 to disable animal respawning.

variables.name: StartingSeason
variables.description: 0=Summer, 1=Autum, 2=Winter, 3=Spring

variables.name: DaysPerSeason
variables.description: How many game days each season lasts

variables.name: DayDur
variables.description: Day duration in minutes

variables.name: NightDur
variables.description: Night duration in minutes

variables.name: VitalDrain
variables.description: How fast your vitals drain 0=Slow, 1=Normal, 2=Fast

variables.name: DogEnabled
variables.description: Enable finding dog companions you can recruit set to true to enable or false to disable

variables.name: RecruitDog
variables.description: Allow players to recruit companion dogs by dropping food and claiming the dog. Set to false to disable.

variables.name: DogNum
variables.description: The maximum amount of companion dogs you can find in the world. Dogs will respawn when needed.

variables.name: BuildingHealth
variables.description: Health multiplier of player placed buildings. By default set to 1.

variables.name: CompanionHealth
variables.description: Dog companion health 0=Low 1=Default 2=High This is not a multiplier, it is a set value for dog companion health.

variables.name: CompanionDmg
variables.description: Dog companion damage 0=Low 1=Default 2=High This is not a multiplier, it is a set value for dog companion damage.

variables.name: AllowDismantle
variables.description: Enable players to dismantle their own buildings.

variables.name: AllowHouseDismantle
variables.description: Enable Players are able to dismantle house props.

variables.name: Territory
variables.description: If true You WILL NOT be allowed to build in someone's spawn point area. For clans only non recruit members can.

variables.name: Decay
variables.description: How many real days it takes for a spawn point to go from 100% health to being destroyed.

variables.name: BuildingDecay
variables.description: How many real days it takes for player built buildings to fully decay. 0 to disable.

variables.name: PickupCleanup
variables.description: How long in game days it takes for dropped pickups to be destroyed.

variables.name: FakeBuildingCleanup
variables.description: How long in minutes it takes for the white blueprint building to be destroyed.

variables.name: FoodDecay
variables.description: Contols how fast food decays 0=Disabled 1=Default. It's a multiplier so if you need to slow down decay by half the value would be 0.5. Values greater than 1 will speed it up.

variables.name: GenFuel
variables.description: Controls how fast house generator consumes fuel. 0.01 to 4. It's a multiplier where 1 is default and less than 1 will slows it down.

variables.name: Sleep
variables.description: Sleep deprivation effect false=Disabled true=Enabled

variables.name: FreezeTime
variables.description: When enabled and server is empty time doesn't pass.

variables.name: Seg0
variables.description: Map is divided into 3 segments, objects that need to spawmn reasonabiliy far are put in Seg0 like houses.

variables.name: Seg1
variables.description: Broken cars and other similar objects are put in Seg1.

variables.name: Seg2
variables.description: Spawn distance performance segment.

variables.name: Voip
variables.description: When set to 1 or true voice chat will be enabled, set 0 or false to disable

variables.name: AIEvent
variables.description: The game will sometimes spawn AI event such as zombies or human raiding your location. How frequence the event is where 0 = Disabled, 1 Low, 2 = Default, 3 = High, 4 = Insane

variables.name: Weather_ClearSky
variables.description: Below you can tweak the odds of each weather type. The current season will still dictate which weather types can spawn.

variables.name: Weather_Cloudy
variables.description: Below you can tweak the odds of each weather type. The current season will still dictate which weather types can spawn.

variables.name: Weather_Foggy
variables.description: Below you can tweak the odds of each weather type. The current season will still dictate which weather types can spawn.

variables.name: Weather_LightRain
variables.description: Below you can tweak the odds of each weather type. The current season will still dictate which weather types can spawn.

variables.name: Weather_Rain
variables.description: Below you can tweak the odds of each weather type. The current season will still dictate which weather types can spawn.

variables.name: Weather_Thunderstorm
variables.description: Below you can tweak the odds of each weather type. The current season will still dictate which weather types can spawn.

variables.name: Weather_LightSnow
variables.description: Below you can tweak the odds of each weather type. The current season will still dictate which weather types can spawn.

variables.name: Weather_Snow
variables.description: Below you can tweak the odds of each weather type. The current season will still dictate which weather types can spawn.

variables.name: Weather_Blizzard
variables.description: Below you can tweak the odds of each weather type. The current season will still dictate which weather types can spawn.
